name: Robe Robin Spiider
comment: Robin Spiider: Spiider, a superbright next generation of LED WashBeam luminaires, using 18 x 40 Watt and 1 x 60 Watt LEDs and combining it with a very efficient 12,5 :1 zoom optical system ranging from tight 4° Beam to wide 50° Wash, makes the product in its class the most powerful LED fixture on the market. Now equipped with Robe's innovative lens coating technology which brings benefits such as  bright and clear lenses, no scratches or marks, higher light output  and longer intervals between cleaning.

capabilities.comment: PWM output frequency of LEDs: Standard (300Hz)
PWM output frequency of LEDs: High (600Hz)
Save Pixel index and Mirror to fixture
RoboSpot disabled - except handle faders and p/t
Ranbow effect (with fade time) from slow to fast
Ranbow effect (without fade time) from slow to fast
Fade time from min to max
Ranbow effect (with fade time) from slow to fast
Ranbow effect (without fade time) from slow to fast

Now equipped with Robe's innovative lens coating technology which brings benefits such as  bright and clear lenses, no scratches or marks, higher light output  and longer intervals between cleaning.
